stories.headline: Giants Trade Dexter Lawrence to Bengals for 10th Overall Pick in Draft Week Blockbuster
stories.editorial_direction: Historic trade — first time Bengals traded a top-10 pick for a player since 1966. Giants get two top-10 picks (5th and 10th), Bengals desperately going all-in. Focus on the unprecedented nature, the Bengals' desperation, and what it says about both teams.

tweets.text:
Draft week blockbuster: The Giants are trading three-time Pro Bowl defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence to the Bengals in a deal that will include the 10th overall pick going to New York, per ESPN sources.

The Giants now head into Thursday night with the 5th and 10th overall picks.

A Bengals trade for Dexter Lawrence is unprecedented: This is the first time in the common draft era that dates back to 1966 in which the Bengals ever have traded a Top-10 pick for a player, per ESPN research.

Absent a trade back info the first round, this will mark just the second time in franchise history the Bengals will not make a first round pick.

The only other instance was 1989.

New York's NFL teams now control 25% of the top 16 picks in Thursday night's draft.

The Giants are slated to pick 5th and 10th, the Jets 2nd and 16th.
John Harbaugh after stealing half the Ravens roster and then sending Dexter Lawrence to their division

key_stats: First time Bengals traded a top-10 pick for a player since 1966
Only second time in franchise history Bengals won't have a first-round pick (1989 was the other)
Giants now have 25% of top 16 picks with Jets
Lawrence: 3x Pro Bowl, had down 2025 season with 0.5 sacks
research_notes.historical_context: This is the first time a player was traded straight up for a top-10 pick since Randy Moss to Raiders in 2005 for 7th overall
financial_implications: Lawrence has 2 years, $42M left on deal
Giants save $13.04M in cap space, take $13.92M dead money hit
Bengals were 31st in cap space before trade
draft_implications: Giants can draft two impact players in top 10
Bengals bet Lawrence more valuable than any rookie in weak draft class
Draft class considered weak at defensive tackle
team_context: Lawrence requested trade after contract talks broke down
John Harbaugh's first draft as Giants coach
Bengals added Jonathan Allen, Boye Mafe, Bryan Cook on defense
meme_potential: Harbaugh raiding Ravens roster then trading to AFC North
Lawrence from contract holdout to big extension
cross_connections: Giants following Harbaugh rebuild model from Ravens
Bengals going all-in like Rams did
research_notes.where_it_goes: Draft is Thursday — will Giants use both picks or trade one? Will Lawrence pass physical and get extension?

stories.headline: LeBron and Bronny Make History as First Father-Son Playoff Duo
stories.editorial_direction: Historic moment overshadows Lakers' upset win. LeBron's emotional postgame reaction is the story. Cover the game context (no Luka/Reaves, beat Durant-less Rockets) but focus on the family milestone.

tweets.text:
"I was on the floor with my son in a playoff game."

What a moment for LeBron, Bronny and the James family 🥹❤️

LeBron James in Game 1 vs Houston:

19 PTS
8 REB
13 AST
2 STL

Passes John Stockton to be the oldest player in playoff history with a PTS/AST double-double.

Bronny tried to get the ball to LeBron and threw it out of bounds 

He going to bed with no dinner tonight 😭
Bron really the greatest when you realize he's been carrying dudes for so long he's carrying his own son now too 😭😭😭

research_notes.historic_milestone: First father-son duo to play together in NBA playoffs history — played about 4 minutes together in 2nd quarter
research_notes.game_context: Lakers upset Rockets 107-98 despite missing Luka Doncic (hamstring) and Austin Reaves (oblique). Durant also out for Houston
research_notes.lebron_performance: 19 points, 13 assists, 8 rebounds — oldest player ever with 10+ assists in playoff game, passing John Stockton
research_notes.luke_kennard_story: Career playoff-high 27 points on 9-13 shooting, 5-5 from three — first Laker with 5+ threes without a miss in playoffs since Robert Horry 1997
research_notes.bronny_stats: 4 minutes, 0 points, 1 turnover, 2 fouls — threw ball out of bounds trying to pass to LeBron
research_notes.emotional_context: LeBron said it's 'probably the craziest thing that's ever happened to me in my career' — his mother watching her son and grandson
research_notes.family_moment: Bronny's mom, siblings, and LeBron's mother Gloria all in attendance for historic moment

stories.headline: Will Anderson Jr. Becomes Highest-Paid Non-QB Ever with $150M Extension
stories.editorial_direction: Historic salary barrier — $50M per year puts him in QB territory. Quick hit on the implications for the position and for C.J. Stroud's upcoming extension.

tweets.text:
The Titans plan to pick up OG Peter Skoronski's fifth-year option, per source.

This sets up Skoronski, the team's No. 11 overall pick in 2023, to make $19.07M in 2027.

Bengals defensive additions this offseason now include:

🏈Dexter Lawrence
🏈Boye Mafe
🏈Bryan Cook
🏈Jonathan Allen

research_notes.salary_milestone: $50M per year average — joins 9 QBs in $50-55M range, only non-QB at that level
research_notes.contract_details: 3 years, $150M with $134M guaranteed and no-trade clause
research_notes.performance_justification: 12 sacks, 20 TFL, 85 pressures in 2025 — finished 2nd in DPOY voting behind Myles Garrett
research_notes.cj_stroud_implications: Sets floor for Stroud extension — can't pay QB less than pass rusher on same team
research_notes.market_impact: Surpasses Micah Parsons' $46.5M average from Green Bay deal

around_the_league.text:

27 PTS

The first Laker to make 5+ 3P without a miss in a playoff game since Robert Horry in 1997.

50 — Shohei Ohtani (active)

Matt Williams
Eugenio Suarez

That's it.

Inside The NBA is WILD lmaoo 

Tney just brought up Ice Spice getting attacked by a fan in McDonalds

"I hear they got some slappy Happy Meals over there" 😭😭

Tarik Skubal vs Red Sox:

6.0 IP
4 H
1 ER

He is the only pitcher with 10 starts of 6+ innings and 10+ strikeouts since the start of last season.
CAPTURED: Hornets Star Lamelo Ball Caught "striking leg" of Mailbox While Pulling Into Driveway of NBA Legend Bam Adebayo to Issue Apology for Flagrant Foul

BREAKING: Braylon Mullins is returning to UConn for his sophomore season, per his father.

Averaged 12.0 PPG last year as a freshman.

Dan Hurley and the Huskies are now firmly in play to reach the Final Four for the fourth time in a five-year span.

tweets.text:
41 year old LeBron was by far and away the best athlete on the floor tonight. 

It just wasn't close. No disrespect to Amen Thompson.
